name: Oxfam America
mission:
Oxfam is a global organization that fights inequality to end poverty and injustice. We offer lifesaving
support in times of crisis and advocate for economic justice, gender equality, and climate action. We
demand equal rights and equal treatment so that everyone can thrive, not just survive. The future is
equal.
theoryOfChange: Oxfam America has a published 'Oxfam America 2030 Strategy Framework'. This framework, approved in March 2020, guides their work towards fighting inequality to end poverty and injustice. It focuses on systemic change in four key areas: economic justice & equal rights, humanitarian response, climate action, and women's rights and gender justice. The strategy also outlines a commitment to revolutionizing their approach through open and humble collaboration with partners, allies, and supporters, leveraging the power of the US for global impact, and striving to become a feminist and anti-racist organization.

scoreSummary: Oxfam AmericaHQ shows exceptional impact and good alignment.

ui_signals_v1.recommendation_rationale: Strong donor fit, low risk profile, and credible supporting evidence for outcomes.

components.evidence: Asnaf: fuqara (+5); Operates in Muslim-majority regions (+3); Strong humanitarian service (+4)
components.name: Muslim Donor Fit

components.improvement_suggestion: Expand services to underserved populations or geographies with limited nonprofit coverage.
components.name: Underserved Space

alignment.rationale: Alignment 34/50: HIGH Muslim donor fit, humanitarian cause area

score_details.score_summary: Oxfam AmericaHQ shows exceptional impact and good alignment.

zakat.claim_evidence: Organization is in zakat denylist (partners but doesn't collect directly) (Source: https://www.oxfamamerica.org/donate/)

all_citations.claim: Oxfam America holds a Charity Navigator score of 99.33333333333333/100 and holds 8.0 months of working capital.
The organization works with local partners to empower poor people in the development of their communities.
all_citations.source_name: Download our most recent financial audit

all_citations.claim: Oxfam programs in Ghana have successfully influenced laws passed with civil society input.
all_citations.source_name: Download NORAD Ghana Final Project Evaluation Report

all_citations.claim: Oxfam has improved the understanding of technical oil and gas issues among media and civil society in Mozambique.
all_citations.source_name: Download NORAD Mozambique Final Project Evaluation Report

all_citations.claim: Civil society amendments proposed through Oxfam-supported initiatives were adopted by the Tanzanian parliament.
all_citations.source_name: Download NORAD Tanzania Final Project Evaluation Report

all_citations.claim: The charity provides various donation options for supporters to contribute to its global mission.
Oxfam America reported total revenue of $75,339,434, a program expense ratio of 72.3%, and fundraising efficiency of $0.21 per $1 raised.

baseline_narrative.amal_score_rationale: Oxfam America earns a high overall rating due to its robust financial accountability and its proven track record in humanitarian urgency and economic advocacy.
areas_for_improvement: Enhancing fundraising efficiency to lower the current cost of $0.21 per $1 raised
Expanding direct service impact metrics across all regional programs

dimension_explanations.alignment: Oxfam America shows high alignment for donors interested in humanitarian causes, offering a direct pathway for sadaqah-eligible contributions to support global poverty alleviation [6]. The organization's focus on economic justice and local empowerment aligns with high-urgency humanitarian needs and a strong track record of organizational transparency [1][2].
dimension_explanations.impact: The organization demonstrates high impact through direct service and advocacy, such as successfully influencing parliamentary amendments in Tanzania and improving media competence on technical issues in Ghana and Mozambique [3][4][5]. With a total revenue of $75,339,434, the charity maintains a program expense ratio of 72.3%, ensuring the majority of funds support its mission [1][7].

baseline_narrative.headline: Oxfam America empowers marginalized communities through economic justice and emergency response to create lasting solutions to poverty.
strengths: Exceptional financial health with a Charity Navigator score of 99.33333333333333/100
Strong liquidity with 8.0 months of working capital
High program efficiency with 72.3% of expenses directed toward core missions
baseline_narrative.summary: Oxfam America is a global organization that partners with local entities to provide funds and resources, ensuring poor people play a central role in their own development [2]. The organization focuses on international relief, emergency response, and economic justice initiatives to address the root causes of inequality [1][7].

all_citations.claim: emergency response and long-term economic justice
all_citations.quote: Programs: Emergency Response, Economic Justice, Gender Equality
Grants and other assistance to foreign organizations: $71,590,162

all_citations.claim: direct service delivery and policy advocacy
Platinum Seal of Transparency from Candid
all_citations.quote: Platinum Seal of Transparency from Candid

all_citations.claim: overall score of 99.99.33333333333333/100 from Charity Navigator
laws being passed with civil society input

all_citations.quote: CSO proposed amendments adopted by parliament
Geographic Coverage: Middle East, Gaza, Afghanistan
Expand services to underserved populations or geographies
We can get there by taking an integrated approach, working together to combat poverty on all levels.

rich_narrative.amal_score_rationale: Oxfam America earns a high overall rating due to its robust financial accountability and its proven track record in humanitarian urgency and economic advocacy.

areas_for_improvement.context: At <cite id="5">72.3%</cite>, the program ratio is below the <cite id="15">peer median of 90.3%</cite>, suggesting higher administrative costs than similar humanitarian organizations.
The organization has experienced a <cite id="16">3-year revenue CAGR of -9.1%</cite>, indicating a contraction in funding that may impact future program scaling.

bbb_assessment.summary: Oxfam America is an Accredited Charity meeting all standards for accountability.

case_against.mitigation_notes: Oxfam's high governance scores and extensive policy advocacy work often require higher administrative investment than simple commodity distribution.
risk_factors: <cite id="16">Negative revenue growth (-9.1%)</cite> over the last three years
<cite id="15">Program efficiency significantly lower</cite> than the peer median of 90.3%
case_against.summary: The primary concern is the <cite id="5">72.3% program expense ratio</cite>, which indicates that nearly 32% of funds are spent on overhead and fundraising.

confidence.data_freshness: Data includes 2024 Form 990 and recent Charity Navigator scores.
confidence.notes: Very high data availability across financial, governance, and impact dimensions.

known_gaps: Program expense ratio is lower than peer median

alignment.improvement: Alignment could be strengthened by <cite id="21">expanding services to underserved geographies</cite> with limited existing nonprofit coverage.

credibility.explanation: Donors can trust Oxfam due to its <cite id="8">99.99.33333333333333/100 from Charity Navigator rating</cite>, its <cite id="7">Platinum Candid Seal</cite>, and its long history <cite id="1">dating back to 1942</cite>.

impact.explanation: Impact is driven by a <cite id="17">direct service model</cite> with a cost of approximately <cite id="18">$79.01 per beneficiary</cite>, which is considered excellent for complex humanitarian work.
impact.improvement: To improve impact scores, the organization could aim to <cite id="5">increase its program expense ratio</cite> closer to the industry standard of 75%.

donor_fit_matrix.evidence_rigor: Grade A - Verified outcomes and theory of change

grantmaking_profile.grant_strategy: Empowers local organizations by providing direct funding for community-led development.

rich_narrative.headline: Oxfam America empowers marginalized communities through economic justice and emergency response to create lasting solutions to poverty.

ideal_donor_profile.best_for_summary: Best for donors who value long-term systemic change alongside emergency relief and prefer giving to highly established, transparent institutions.
donor_motivations: Want to support humanitarian aid in Gaza, Yemen, and Afghanistan
Value advocacy that addresses the root causes of poverty
Prioritize organizations with the highest levels of third-party transparency seals
Prefer a secular, professionalized approach to international development
giving_considerations: A larger portion of the gift goes to administrative and fundraising costs compared to peers
The organization is experiencing a period of revenue contraction
Impact is often measured in long-term policy shifts rather than just immediate outputs
ideal_donor_profile.not_ideal_for: Donors seeking 100% donation models or those who prioritize the highest possible program-to-overhead ratios.

impact_evidence.evidence_grade_explanation: Grade A is based on <cite id="11">verified outcome metrics</cite> and documented external evaluations showing legislative and social impact.
impact_evidence.theory_of_change_summary: Oxfam uses an integrated approach to <cite id="23">combat poverty on all levels</cite>, combining direct aid with local empowerment and policy advocacy.
impact_evidence.why_evidence_matters: Evidence ensures that interventions actually change the systems that keep people in poverty.

long_term_outlook.room_for_funding_explanation: Despite its size, the <cite id="16">recent revenue decline</cite> suggests a significant need for new donor support to maintain program scale.

peer_comparison.differentiator: Oxfam is distinguished by its <cite id="1">80+ year history</cite> and its <cite id="22">Platinum transparency rating</cite>, though it trails peers in <cite id="15">program expense efficiency</cite>.

similar_organizations.differentiator: Similar focus on humanitarian relief and economic empowerment.
similar_organizations.name: CARE USA

similar_organizations.differentiator: Similar humanitarian focus but with a more specific Muslim community orientation.
similar_organizations.name: Baitulmaal, Inc.

similar_organizations.differentiator: Focuses specifically on Palestinian refugees with a larger ground presence in that region.
similar_organizations.name: UNRWA

strengths.detail: Oxfam maintains a <cite id="8">99.33/100 overall score from Charity Navigator</cite>, supported by a <cite id="9">100% independent board</cite> and perfect scores in culture and leadership.
The organization holds <cite id="10">8.0 months of working capital</cite>, ensuring it can sustain operations during economic volatility or sudden humanitarian crises.
Oxfam tracks <cite id="11">specific outcome metrics</cite> such as legislative changes and media competence, moving beyond simple output tracking.

strengths_deep_dive: Oxfam America's operational strength lies in its ability to combine immediate relief with systemic change. For instance, in its 2024 financial reporting, it demonstrated a massive scale of grantmaking, providing <cite id="4">over $71 million to foreign partners</cite>. This localized approach is backed by rigorous evaluation; project reports in regions like Ghana and Tanzania show that Oxfam's interventions led to <cite id="12">laws being passed with civil society input</cite> and <cite id="13">amendments adopted by parliament</cite>. This level of policy impact, combined with <cite id="14">fundraising efficiency of $0.21 per $1 raised</cite>, indicates a high-capacity organization capable of leveraging donor funds for both immediate aid and long-term structural improvement.
rich_narrative.summary: Oxfam America is a global humanitarian organization that has been <cite id="1">operating since 1942</cite> to address the root causes of poverty and inequality. The organization distinguishes itself through a dual-track approach of <cite id="2">emergency response and long-term economic justice</cite>, partnering with local organizations to empower marginalized communities. Financially, the organization is robust, reporting <cite id="3">$83,115,051 in total revenue</cite> for the 2024 fiscal year. A significant portion of its operations is dedicated to international aid, with <cite id="4">$71,590,162 distributed in foreign grants</cite> to 354 recipients across Africa, Asia, and the Middle East. Oxfam maintains a <cite id="5">program expense ratio of 72.3%</cite>, which, while lower than some humanitarian peers, supports a sophisticated infrastructure for <cite id="6">direct service delivery and policy advocacy</cite>. The organization is highly transparent, earning a <cite id="7">Platinum Seal of Transparency from Candid</cite> and a near-perfect <cite id="8">overall score of 99.99.33333333333333/100 from Charity Navigator</cite>. Its work in crisis zones like Gaza, Yemen, and Afghanistan makes it a critical actor in regions of high concern for Muslim donors, despite its status as a secular entity.
